name: promptconduit
description: Local, real-time visibility into your AI coding sessions — live token cost in the status bar, a 3D Orchestration Theater that replays how your agents work, and an offline Agent Coaching report. 100% local.

promptconduit.cost.enabled.description: Show the realtime token-cost item in the status bar.

promptconduit.cost.binaryPath.description: Path to the promptconduit CLI (used by session restore). Leave blank to auto-detect on PATH and common Homebrew locations.

enumDescriptions: Fetch issue/PR titles and status from github.com (sends only owner/repo/number for the current repo).
Infer issue/PR numbers from branch and commit messages, but make no network calls.
Show no GitHub links on Orchestration Theater hover cards.
promptconduit.visualizer.githubEnrichmen.description: How the Orchestration Theater resolves the GitHub issue/PR shown on hover cards.

promptconduit.visualizer.githubToken.description: Optional GitHub token for issue/PR enrichment (raises the API rate limit and reaches private repos). Falls back to the GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN environment variable.

enumDescriptions: On startup, silently reopen interrupted Claude Code sessions in this workspace (a summary notification confirms what was restored).
On startup, ask before reopening interrupted sessions.
Never auto-restore. You can still run 'PromptConduit: Restore AI Sessions' manually.
promptconduit.restore.mode.description: Reopen Claude Code sessions that were interrupted when the editor restarted, in the exact directory they ran in (worktrees included). Sessions still running are never touched.

promptconduit.restore.sinceHours.description: How far back to look for interrupted sessions to restore, in hours.
